description: Curated evaluation dataset for txukun / txukun-cli
sources: Elhuyar GEC dataset (Beloki et al., SEPLN 2020) — CC-BY-NC-SA 4.0

categories.grammar: Real grammatical errors from Elhuyar GEC dataset (R1-R4)
categories.spelling: Real sentences with a single controlled typo injected
categories.realword: Valid word swapped for its confusable partner (semantic error)
categories.multi_error: 2-3 typos in one sentence (tests batch correction)
categories.paragraph: Multi-sentence paragraphs with errors (tests sentence splitting)
categories.missing_extra: Duplicated or deleted word (tests structural error detection)

schema.category: grammar | cappunct | spelling | mixed | clean | realword | multi_error | paragraph | markdown | missing_extra
schema.input: Text with errors (what the corrector receives)
schema.metadata: Additional info (error types, typo type, etc.)
